name: Vertiv / 维谛技术
sector: Data-center power and cooling / 数据中心电力与散热
summary: Vertiv 提供数据中心电力、热管理、液冷和机柜基础设施，是 AI 机柜功率密度提升后的关键配套公司。 / Vertiv provides data-center power, thermal management, liquid cooling, and rack infrastructure, making it a key support company as AI rack power density rises.
summaryZh: Vertiv 提供数据中心电力、热管理、液冷和机柜基础设施，是 AI 机柜功率密度提升后的关键配套公司。
summaryEn: Vertiv provides data-center power, thermal management, liquid cooling, and rack infrastructure, making it a key support company as AI rack power density rises.

business.description: 公司向数据中心、通信网络和商业/工业客户提供关键电源、热管理、机柜、监控和服务。 / The company provides critical power, thermal management, racks, monitoring, and services to data centers, communication networks, and commercial/industrial customers.
business.descriptionZh: 公司向数据中心、通信网络和商业/工业客户提供关键电源、热管理、机柜、监控和服务。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides critical power, thermal management, racks, monitoring, and services to data centers, communication networks, and commercial/industrial customers.
revenueModel: 热管理与液冷 / thermal management and liquid cooling
机柜与服务 / racks and services

business.thesis: AI 下一阶段不仅看 GPU，还要看电力、制冷和机柜交付；Vertiv 直接处在数据中心电力与散热扩容层。 / The next AI phase is not just GPUs; power, cooling, and rack delivery matter, and Vertiv sits directly in the data-center power and thermal expansion layer.
business.thesisZh: AI 下一阶段不仅看 GPU，还要看电力、制冷和机柜交付；Vertiv 直接处在数据中心电力与散热扩容层。
business.thesisEn: The next AI phase is not just GPUs; power, cooling, and rack delivery matter, and Vertiv sits directly in the data-center power and thermal expansion layer.
riskNotes: 数据中心建设节奏、客户资本开支和交付能力会影响订单兑现。 / Data-center construction timing, customer capex, and delivery capacity affect order conversion.
液冷路线、供应链成本和项目毛利率仍需跟踪。 / Liquid-cooling architecture, supply-chain costs, and project margins need monitoring.

themeExposure.roleZh: 高功率机柜电力与散热核心配套
themeExposure.roleEn: Core high-density rack power and cooling support
themeExposure.rationale: AI 机柜功率密度提升后，供电、配电、热管理和液冷会直接影响数据中心交付节奏。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: AI 机柜功率密度提升后，供电、配电、热管理和液冷会直接影响数据中心交付节奏。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: As AI rack power density rises, power, distribution, thermal management, and liquid cooling directly affect data-center delivery cadence.
